title: zombie siege (Content pack)
description: a group of items and loot table integrations that fit ether a war or zombie apoc modpack
body:
a small mod that add a few items and loot table integrations

 

1.0.3 - mutant monsters compatability

adds coin to mutant zombie drops


items:
stimpack heals 2 hearts
bloodbag heals 4 hearts
painkillers makes you take a lot less damage for 15 sec
bandage gives regen heals 3 and a half hearts
coins: copper, silver, gold, platinum.

all coins are droped by all zombies

you can add this to any modpack you want

 

join my discord to report bugs and help support me [Day of the Dead Discord server](https://discord.gg/PAHCrH5uPT)
